name: pr-description-markdown
description: Codex skill for drafting concise, reviewer-friendly pull request descriptions.

interface.shortDescription: Draft or revise PR descriptions in a consistent Markdown format.
interface.longDescription: Adds a Codex skill that structures PR descriptions with Summary, What, Why, optional Review Notes, and Validation sections.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me draft or revise a pull request description using the pr-description-markdown format.
